text: Last summer, I planned a trip to Japan. I spent weeks researching places to visit and learning a few basic phrases. Once I arrived, everything felt new and exciting. The food was incredible, from fresh sushi to warm bowls of ramen. However, language barriers were challenging at times. I often used hand gestures or a translation app to communicate. Despite this, the people were friendly and helpful. I immersed myself in the local culture, visiting temples and trying traditional tea ceremonies. Now, months later, I still treasure the memories of that journey. Traveling taught me to embrace differences and step out of my comfort zone.
